languages.text: {n}Из вокс-решетки раздается скрипучий механический смех. Заметив, что вы не разделяете его веселья, Вольный Торговец хмурится.{/n} "О. Так вы серьезно?"
{n}A mechanical laugh creaks its way out of the vox-grille. When he sees that you do not share his amusement, the Rogue Trader frowns.{/n} "Oh. You were in earnest?"
languages.original_text: {n}Из вокс-решетки раздается скрипучий механический смех. Заметив, что вы не разделяете его веселья, Вольный Торговец хмурится.{/n} "О. Так вы серьезно?"

traits.locale_text: {n}A mechanical laugh creaks its way out of the vox-grille. When he sees that you do not share his amusement, the Rogue Trader frowns.{/n} "Oh. You were in earnest?"
{n}A mechanical laugh creaks its way out of the vox-grille. When he sees that you do not share his amusement, the Rogue Trader frowns.{/n} "Oh. You were in earnest?"
{n}A mechanical laugh creaks its way out of the vox-grille. When he sees that you do not share his amusement, the Rogue Trader frowns.{/n} "Oh. You were in earnest?"

languages.text: {n}音阵格栅里挤出一阵机械化的干笑声。当他发现你并不觉得好笑时，行商浪人皱起了眉头。{/n}“哦。你是认真的？”
languages.original_text: {n}A mechanical laugh creaks its way out of the vox-grille. When he sees that you do not share his amusement, the Rogue Trader frowns.{/n} "Oh. You were in earnest?"

traits.locale_text: {n}音阵格栅里挤出一阵机械化的干笑声。当他发现你并不觉得好笑时，行商浪人皱起了眉头。{/n}“哦。你是认真的？”

languages.text: {n}Un rire mécanique s'échappe de la grille-vox. Constatant que vous ne partagez pas son amusement, le libre-marchand se renfrogne.{/n} « Oh. Vous parliez sérieusement ? »
languages.original_text: {n}A mechanical laugh creaks its way out of the vox-grille. When he sees that you do not share his amusement, the Rogue Trader frowns.{/n} "Oh. You were in earnest?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Un rire mécanique s'échappe de la grille-vox. Constatant que vous ne partagez pas son amusement, le libre-marchand se renfrogne.{/n} « Oh. Vous parliez sérieusement ? »

languages.text: {n}Voks ızgarasından gıcırtılı mekanik bir kahkaha yükseliyor. Onunla aynı hisleri paylaşmadığını gören Hür Tacir kaşlarını çatıyor.{/n} "Ciddi misin?"
languages.original_text: {n}A mechanical laugh creaks its way out of the vox-grille. When he sees that you do not share his amusement, the Rogue Trader frowns.{/n} "Oh. You were in earnest?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Voks ızgarasından gıcırtılı mekanik bir kahkaha yükseliyor. Onunla aynı hisleri paylaşmadığını gören Hür Tacir kaşlarını çatıyor.{/n} "Ciddi misin?"

languages.text: {n}Una risa mecánica emana de la parrilla de voco. Cuando ve que no compartes su diversión, el Comerciante Independiente frunce el ceño.{/n} «Ah. ¿Hablaba en serio?».
languages.original_text: {n}A mechanical laugh creaks its way out of the vox-grille. When he sees that you do not share his amusement, the Rogue Trader frowns.{/n} "Oh. You were in earnest?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Una risa mecánica emana de la parrilla de voco. Cuando ve que no compartes su diversión, el Comerciante Independiente frunce el ceño.{/n} «Ah. ¿Hablaba en serio?».

languages.text: {n}Aus dem Vox-Gitter ertönt ein mechanisches Lachen. Als er bemerkt, dass du seine Belustigung nicht teilst, runzelt der Freihändler die Stirn.{/n} "Oh. Das war Euer Ernst?"
languages.original_text: {n}A mechanical laugh creaks its way out of the vox-grille. When he sees that you do not share his amusement, the Rogue Trader frowns.{/n} "Oh. You were in earnest?"

traits.locale_text: {n}Aus dem Vox-Gitter ertönt ein mechanisches Lachen. Als er bemerkt, dass du seine Belustigung nicht teilst, runzelt der Freihändler die Stirn.{/n} "Oh. Das war Euer Ernst?"

languages.text:
{n}機械的な笑い声で、ヴォックス・グリルから軋み音がする。その笑い声に、あなたは共感できない。ローグ・トレーダーは眉をひそめる。{/n}
「ああ。本気だったのか？」
languages.original_text: {n}A mechanical laugh creaks its way out of the vox-grille. When he sees that you do not share his amusement, the Rogue Trader frowns.{/n} "Oh. You were in earnest?"
